name: RCB OE TL.Z./Henkel Vz
summary: Henkel AG & Co. KGaA is a German chemical and consumer goods company headquartered in Düsseldorf. It operates in three business units: Adhesive Technologies, Beauty Care, and Laundry & Home Care, offering a wide range of products globally. The company's portfolio includes well-known brands such as Persil, Schwarzkopf, and Loctite.
